summary: Tested ProposalView page redesign - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Day-wise itinerary with collapsible cards, Travel Insurance section, tab navigation, and expand/collapse functionality all working correctly. Old City Tour Section confirmed removed.

issues: React hydration warning about <tr>/<span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

proposal_view_page_load.details: ProposalView page loads correctly from My Proposals list with all sections visible

day_wise_itinerary_cards.details: Day cards render correctly with colored circles (orange for Day 1/Arrival, pink for Day 2/Departure), dates, and collapsible content

day_1_arrival_expanded_default.details: Day 1 (Arrival into Dubai) is expanded by default showing: orange alert banner, flight arrival info (IX-343), transfer with VIEW button, 'Private Transfers' and '4 Bags' badges, overnight stay, and 3-column meals grid (Not Included)

day_2_collapsed_default.details: Day 2 (Departure from Dubai) is collapsed by default and can be expanded by clicking - shows pink alert banner when expanded

expand_all_days_button.details: EXPAND ALL DAYS button toggles between '+ EXPAND ALL DAYS' and '- COLLAPSE ALL DAYS', correctly expands/collapses all day cards

transfer_badges.details: Transfer badges 'Private Transfers' and '4 Bags' display correctly in teal/gray pill format

travel_insurance_section.details: Travel Insurance section appears at bottom with Shield icon, '$50,000 coverage', 'Only for Age Below 60 Yrs', and 'Not Included' label in red

flights_section.details: Flights section shows outbound (Dubai Intl Airport to Dubai, AirIndiaExpress IX-343) and return (Dubai to Dubai Intl Airport, IX-344) with times, baggage, meals, cabin info

hotel_section.details: Hotel section renders with image, VIEW button, star rating, rating score (7.4 Good), check-in/out times, room info, 'What to know about this hotel' grid

tab_navigation.details: All 5 tabs (Itinerary, Inclusions, Terms and Policies, Messages, Request Changes) switch correctly with proper content display

right_sidebar_price_breakdown.details: Price breakdown sidebar shows correctly: Estimated Date of Booking, 1 room/2 adults, Nationality, Departure City, 4 Seater Sedan badge, Price per adult, Total Price, AED 500, BOOK NOW/ACCEPT PROPOSAL/NEED HELP/MAIL/WHATSAPP buttons, Payment Schedule, Chat with client

city_tour_section_removed.details: Old City Tour Section confirmed completely removed from ProposalView.jsx (grep found no matches)

critical_code_review_comments: expandedDays state initialized correctly with {1: true} so Day 1 is expanded by default (line 425)
toggleAllDays function correctly toggles allExpanded state and updates expandedDays for all days (lines 572-580)
AnimatePresence with motion.div provides smooth expand/collapse animation (lines 1203-1211)
Day cards use proper colored circles: orange (arrival), pink (departure), teal (middle days) via cn() conditional classes (lines 1180-1185)
Travel Insurance section properly placed at bottom with data-testid='travel-insurance-section' (lines 1472-1488)
seed_data_creation: Used existing proposals from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProposalView page fully redesigned to Nexus DMC style. Test flow: Login -> My Leads dropdown -> My Proposals -> Click 'View Proposal' -> ProposalView loads with: Fixed header tabs, left sidebar trip overview, hero image with play button, map, Flights section, Hotel section, Day-wise itinerary with collapsible cards (Day 1 expanded by default), Travel Insurance at bottom, and right sidebar price breakdown. EXPAND ALL DAYS button and individual day toggles work correctly. All 5 tabs (Itinerary, Inclusions, Terms and Policies, Messages, Request Changes) switch correctly.
